MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshari, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Wai Yue Lee Fong is present.
The Plaintiff's (Cantonese) Interpreter, Keith Chow, is also present.
Daniel M. Bornstein representing the plaintiff.

Defendants Dong Xiang Yu and Wu Qiong Chen are present.
Gerald Hall representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.
